package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceInterfaceMapForTypedValues() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_data_structure_choice_interface_map_for_typed_values"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Data structure choice. Flag map[string]any used for homogeneous hot-path values where typed structs avoid assertions."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
